'''âf-b-j''' ('''fabaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:edificate|edificate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:edificate|edificate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-b-j
|-
! Lemma
| fabaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fabajithi|fabajithi]] || [[word:fabajiji|fabajiji]] || [[word:fabajishi|fabajishi]] || [[word:fabaji|fabaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabajuthuth|fabajuthuth]] || [[word:fabajujuj|fabajujuj]] || [[word:fabajushush|fabajushush]] || [[word:fabaj|fabaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabajuthu|fabajuthu]] || [[word:fabajuju|fabajuju]] || [[word:fabajushu|fabajushu]] || [[word:fabaju|fabaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabajufuth|fabajufuth]] || [[word:fabajufuj|fabajufuj]] || [[word:fabajufush|fabajufush]] || [[word:fabajuf|fabajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fabajethe|fabajethe]] || [[word:fabajeje|fabajeje]] || [[word:fabajeshe|fabajeshe]] || [[word:fabaje|fabaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabajothoth|fabajothoth]] || [[word:fabajojoj|fabajojoj]] || [[word:fabajoshosh|fabajoshosh]] || [[word:fabaj|fabaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabajotho|fabajotho]] || [[word:fabajojo|fabajojo]] || [[word:fabajosho|fabajosho]] || [[word:fabajo|fabajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabajofoth|fabajofoth]] || [[word:fabajofoj|fabajofoj]] || [[word:fabajofosh|fabajofosh]] || [[word:fabajof|fabajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fabajĂŠthĂŠ|fabajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fabajĂŠjĂŠ|fabajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fabajĂŠshĂŠ|fabajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fabajĂŠ|fabajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabajathath|fabajathath]] || [[word:fabajajaj|fabajajaj]] || [[word:fabajashash|fabajashash]] || [[word:fabaj|fabaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabajatha|fabajatha]] || [[word:fabajaja|fabajaja]] || [[word:fabajasha|fabajasha]] || [[word:fabaja|fabaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabajafath|fabajafath]] || [[word:fabajafaj|fabajafaj]] || [[word:fabajafash|fabajafash]] || [[word:fabajaf|fabajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fabajasha|fabajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofabajasha|gofabajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifabajasha|gokifabajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fabajnĂŒsha|fabajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofabajnknĂŒsha|gofabajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifabajnĂŒsha|gokifabajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fabajshĂ«sha|fabajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofabajnkshĂ«sha|gofabajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifabajshĂ«sha|gokifabajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fabajrosha|fabajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofabajnkrosha|gofabajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifabajrosha|gokifabajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fabajmusha|fabajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofabajnkmusha|gofabajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifabajmusha|gokifabajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fabajsherasha|fabajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofabajnksherasha|gofabajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifabajsherasha|gokifabajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fabajngasha|fabajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofabajnkngasha|gofabajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifabajngasha|gokifabajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fabajyasha|fabajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofabajnkyasha|gofabajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifabajyasha|gokifabajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fabajyamasha|fabajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofabajnkyamasha|gofabajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifabajyamasha|gokifabajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fabajnĂŒshĂ«sha|fabajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofabajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gofabajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifabajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokifabajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fabajnĂŒrosha|fabajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofabajnknĂŒrosha|gofabajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifabajnĂŒrosha|gokifabajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fabajnĂŒmusha|fabajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofabajnknĂŒmusha|gofabajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifabajnĂŒmusha|gokifabajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fabajshĂ«nĂŒsha|fabajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofabajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gofabajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifabajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokifabajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fabajshĂ«rosha|fabajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofabajnkshĂ«rosha|gofabajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifabajshĂ«rosha|gokifabajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fabajshĂ«musha|fabajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofabajnkshĂ«musha|gofabajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifabajshĂ«musha|gokifabajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fabajronĂŒsha|fabajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofabajnkronĂŒsha|gofabajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifabajronĂŒsha|gokifabajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fabajroshĂ«sha|fabajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofabajnkroshĂ«sha|gofabajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifabajroshĂ«sha|gokifabajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fabajromusha|fabajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofabajnkromusha|gofabajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifabajromusha|gokifabajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fabajmunĂŒsha|fabajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofabajnkmunĂŒsha|gofabajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifabajmunĂŒsha|gokifabajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fabajmushĂ«sha|fabajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofabajnkmushĂ«sha|gofabajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifabajmushĂ«sha|gokifabajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fabajmurosha|fabajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofabajnkmurosha|gofabajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifabajmurosha|gokifabajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fabaj|fabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:fĂŠbĂŠj|fĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofabaj|hofabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hofĂŠbĂŠj|hofĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofabaj|hohofabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofĂŠbĂŠj|hohofĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒfabaj|nĂŒfabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒfĂŠbĂŠj|nĂŒfĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfabaj|nĂŒnĂŒfabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠbĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻfabaj|nĂŻfabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻfĂŠbĂŠj|nĂŻfĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfabaj|nĂŻnĂŻfabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠbĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufabaj|lufabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lufĂŠbĂŠj|lufĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufabaj|lulufabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufĂŠbĂŠj|lulufĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifabaj|lifabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lifĂŠbĂŠj|lifĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifabaj|lilifabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifĂŠbĂŠj|lilifĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofabaj|kofabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kofĂŠbĂŠj|kofĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofabaj|kokofabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofĂŠbĂŠj|kokofĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefabaj|kefabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kefĂŠbĂŠj|kefĂŠbĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefabaj|kekefabaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefĂŠbĂŠj|kekefĂŠbĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
